channel.title: ps on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in ps on IT notes

item.title: Wait Process to Finish
item.description: Cross platform solutution: while kill -0 PID 2> /dev/null; do sleep 1; done; Example: $ sleep 60 & $ while kill -0 $!; do echo 1 && sleep 0.5; done If using FreeBSD: pwait Also lsoft can be used but requires that the $pid has open files: lsof -p $pid +r 1 &>/dev/null
